discovery.description: Call discover_tools to browse 409+ tools by category or task instead of loading all schemas into context.

examples.result: top matching tools ranked by relevance

categories.name: travel
categories.providers: Amadeus, Aviasales, Sabre, IRCTC Indian Railways
categories.examples: flight search, pricing, airport lookup, Indian train schedules, live train status

categories.name: weather
categories.providers: OpenWeatherMap, NWS, IQAir, NOAA, NOAA AWC, CheckWX, AVWX
categories.examples: current weather, forecast, alerts, air quality, aviation METAR/TAF/SIGMET (raw + decoded JSON), parsed NOTAMs and PIREPs

categories.name: finance
categories.providers: Finnhub, FRED, FDIC, ECB, RateAPI, IBAN, World Bank, Razorpay IFSC
categories.examples: stock quotes, FX rates, economic data, mortgage rates, global indicators

categories.name: crypto
categories.providers: CoinGecko, Polymarket, Hyperliquid, AsterDEX
categories.examples: prices, markets, prediction markets, DeFi

categories.name: search
categories.providers: Serper, Tavily, Exa
categories.examples: web search, news search, semantic search

categories.name: news
categories.providers: NewsData, GDELT, Currents
categories.examples: latest news, global events, crypto news

categories.name: location
categories.providers: Geoapify, Geocodio, Foursquare, Walk Score, Realtor, Open Charge Map
categories.examples: geocoding, places, routing, real estate

categories.name: health
categories.providers: USDA, OpenFDA, WHO, FatSecret, Spoonacular, ClinicalTrials, PubChem, CDC, UK FSA, RxNorm, MyGene.info
categories.examples: nutrition, drug safety, clinical trials, recipes, UK food hygiene ratings, drug nomenclature, gene annotation

categories.name: entertainment
categories.providers: TMDB, Ticketmaster, RAWG, IGDB, Jikan, Lichess, Chess.com, MusicBrainz, PodcastIndex, API-Sports, Met Museum, Rijksmuseum, Cleveland Museum, OpenDota
categories.examples: movies, events, games, anime, chess/esports, music, podcasts, sports, art collections, Dota 2 stats

categories.name: education
categories.providers: OpenAlex, arXiv, PubMed, Open Library, College Scorecard, DBLP
categories.examples: papers, books, colleges

categories.name: jobs
categories.providers: BLS, O*NET, ESCO, CareerJet, USAJOBS
categories.examples: salary data, occupations, job listings, US federal civil-service

categories.name: space
categories.providers: NASA, JPL, FIRMS
categories.examples: astronomy, asteroids, fire detection

categories.name: social
categories.providers: Mastodon, Bluesky, Twitter/X
categories.examples: trending posts, profiles, search

categories.name: legal
categories.providers: Regulations.gov, Federal Register, CourtListener, GOV.UK Content API, FCC Open Data
categories.examples: regulations, court opinions, federal rules, UK government documents, FCC filings

categories.name: business
categories.providers: GLEIF, Companies House, Hunter.io
categories.examples: LEI lookup, UK companies, email enrichment

categories.name: developer
categories.providers: QRServer, WhoisXML, TimeAPI, NHTSA, Langbly, ConvertAPI, API2PDF, IPQualityScore, NIST NVD
categories.examples: QR codes, WHOIS, VIN decode, translation, PDF generation, CVE vulnerabilities

categories.name: media
categories.providers: Pexels, Stability AI, OCR.space, ARTIC, Europeana, AssemblyAI
categories.examples: stock photos, image generation, OCR, art, transcription

categories.name: infrastructure
categories.providers: Cloudflare, NameSilo, Browserbase
categories.examples: DNS, domains, browser automation

categories.name: messaging

categories.examples: SMS, email, chat, email validation

categories.name: marketing
categories.providers: AIPush, Diffbot

categories.name: world
categories.providers: REST Countries, Nager.Date, GDACS, VATcomply, Open Food Facts, USGS Water, NOAA Tides, Statistics Sweden (SCB), Statistics Norway (SSB), NREL AFDC, NREL PVWatts
categories.examples: countries, holidays, disasters, VAT, food products, streamflow, water quality, tides & currents, Sweden statistics, Norway statistics, US alt-fuel stations, solar PV output estimation
